feature_description: Confirmed-ready subset of the original nonlinear challenger feature set, limited to the five features whose project sources and source columns are explicitly confirmed by the source audit.
d0_visibility_statement: All listed features must be computable using information visible by D0 close and must not depend on D1 entry execution, D5 exit realization, or any post-signal execution outcome.
leakage_risk_notes: Do not include label columns, realized execution outcomes, frozen ranking outputs, or any field that becomes known only after D0 signal formation. Maintain PIT discipline under the trainval research snapshot.
missing_value_policy: Missing values to be handled by predeclared training-time policy only; no post-validation feature-specific imputation changes allowed.
winsorize_or_clip_policy: No additional feature-specific clipping decisions may be introduced after preregistration; any clipping must remain frozen once finalized.
standardization_policy: Tree model draft assumes no mandatory global standardization; any preprocessing choice must remain fixed after manifest freeze.
